stories.title: CPSC Recall — MedPride Baby Oil Bottles Lack Child-Resistant Packaging

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
MedPride Baby Oil recalled — ~8,420 bottles. Packaging not child-resistant: petroleum distillates can fatally damage lungs if swallowed. Secure it now and contact Shield Line for a full refund.
#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
MedPride Baby Oil recall: clear bottle, pink cap, white-and-pink label. ~8,420 sold on Amazon. Packaging not child-resistant — fatal if swallowed. Secure it and request a refund from Shield Line. cpsc.gov
#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Colorado Springs 4th of July 2026 — Family Guide to Celebrations (America's 250th)

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
COS July 4 family events: 🎆 Ford Amphitheater: symphony + fireworks, ticketed, 9 PM 🎆 Banning Lewis Ranch: free, fireworks at dusk 🎆 Palmer Lake: free, 9:15 PM 🎆 Rock Ledge Ranch: daytime, 10 AM–4 PM
#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
July 4 is America's 250th AND Colorado's 150th. Star-Spangled Symphony at Ford Amphitheater — Colorado Springs Philharmonic, Star Wars, 1812 Overture, fireworks at 9 PM. Banning Lewis Ranch is free.
#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Rosemont Reservoir July 4 Opening Update — COS Families Could Camp This Weekend

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Rosemont Reservoir could open for camping and kayaking around July 4 — ~12 miles from COS at 9,600 ft. ADA restrooms. Non-motorized boating. State parks pass required. No swimming.
#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: PPLD Summer Adventure — A Month In, Here's How to Finish Strong (Through July 31)

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
COS: PPLD Summer Adventure runs through July 31 — 5 weeks left. Complete 30 days of reading, creating, and exploring. Prizes include a Broadmoor Cloud Camp stay. All ages, free. ppld.beanstack.org
#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting

stories.title: Summer Screen Time Tips — What the AAP Says and What COS Offers Instead

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
School's out — screen time tends to climb. AAP 2026: under 18 months no screens; ages 2–5 max 1 hour/day; ages 6+ consistent limits that protect sleep and outdoor time. COS has free alternatives.
#COSParenting #ColoradoSprings #COSKids #PikesPeakParenting
